items.name: Abandoned Power Plant kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes an abandoned power plant teeming with electricity.

items.name: Altar of the Flame kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes an altar accompanied by roaring flames

items.name: Aspear Berry
items.description: This berry has a distinctively sharp sour taste. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Bean
items.description: Small beans that are jam-packed with nutrients. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Bitter hamburger steak
items.description: A bitter-tasting hamberuger steak topped with leaves. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten

items.name: Bouldery Badge
items.description: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with gray light.

items.name: Bread bowl
items.description: Spicy bread that's delicious even when burnt. Powers up Cut when eaten.

items.name: Bruised berry
items.description: A bruised berry you got from Chef Dente. Restores a bit of PP when eaten

items.name: Carrot bread
items.description: Spicy bread with an intense carrot flavor. Powers up Cut when eaten.

items.name: Cascade-like Badge
items.description: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with blue light

items.name: Cave mushrooms
items.description: Mushrooms that grow in damp places such as caves or under shady trees. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Charging station kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a device that's perfect for charging things up

items.name: Chesto Berry
items.description: A rock-hard berry with a dry flavor. Restores some PP when eaten

items.name: Chili sauce
items.description: Sauce with an enticingly spicy flavor. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes lava!

items.name: City cottage kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a place where two Pokémon can relax.

items.name: City den kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a den for medium-sized Pokémon or smaller

items.name: City house kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! Let's make a ginormous house where everyone can live together

items.name: City hut kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a hut that any Pokémon could easily live in

items.name: Common candy
items.description: A piece of candy you got from Chef Dente. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Concert stage kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a stage big enough to hold all your friends
items.map: Reach Rank 8 in Rocky Ridges and put in shop

items.name: Cotton Spores
items.description: Small, white tufts of cotton. Bring them to Hoppip!

items.name: Crouton salad
items.description: A spicy salad with a delightfully crunchy texture. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Crushed-berry salad
items.description: A salad with a dry flavor, made with crushed Chesto Berries. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

items.name: Curry and rice
items.description: An absolutely essential meal for any party. Enjoy some tasty food alongside other Pokémon!

items.name: Earth Badge
items.description: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with green light

items.name: Electrifying soup
items.description: A shockingly spicy soup.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Flavorful soup
items.description: A sour soup bursting with flavor. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Flower cushion
items.description: A cute flower-shaped cushion. It would look nice on some grassy ground.

items.name: Flower table
items.description: A table with a flower-patterned tablecloth. It makes any meal feel like a picnic

items.name: Fluffy bread
items.description: Sweet bread made with Pecha Berries. Powers up cut when eaten.

items.name: Fountain plaza kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a plaza that's perfect for meetups

items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes frozen mountains with a mystical atmosphere

items.name: Fresh carrot
items.description: You can harvest these spicy carrots by pulling up on their leaves. Restores some PP when eaten.

items.name: Fresh Water
items.description: Delicious water that's perfect for making soup. Drink some and spit it out to make things wet.

items.name: Furnace kit
items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a generator that burns stuff to produce heaps of power

items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a stately house well-suited for luxuriating

items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This makes a cool stone house

items.name: Healthy soup

items.description: Gather some Pokémon and build away! This will make you want to dance as you're building it

items.description: A soup with a dry flavor made with mushroom broth.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

items.name: Mysterious Gogggles
items.description: Goggles with mysterious power. Wearing these allows you to peek into someone's cloud island
